title: "Best of Oudtshoorn" winners announced
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months, our readers have spoken and it gives us great pleasure to announce and congratulate the winners of the","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months, our readers have spoken and it gives us great pleasure to announce and congratulate the winners of the"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"2024 Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you to the people of Oudtshoorn – your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses in Oudtshoorn are the foundation of this project.","html":"Thank you to the people of Oudtshoorn – your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses in Oudtshoorn are the foundation of this project."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The overwhelming response and participation from our loyal readers, and the community’s shared excitement has reaffirmed what we believed could be an uplifting and enriching project for businesses in our beautiful town.","html":"The overwhelming response and participation from our loyal readers, and the community’s shared excitement has reaffirmed what we believed could be an uplifting and enriching project for businesses in our beautiful town."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"PHOTO GALLERY: Best of Oudtshoorn winners"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lots of respect to every nominated business, and a massive congratulations to each of our 2024 category winners – you make Oudtshoorn proud!","html":"Lots of respect to every nominated business, and a massive congratulations to each of our 2024 category winners – you make Oudtshoorn proud!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 2024 winners are: Click here to see the full list of winners","html":"The 2024 winners are: Click here to see the full list of winners"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 2024 Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards! supplement is also available in today's issue of Oudtshoorn Courant.","html":"The 2024 Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards! supplement is also available in today's issue of Oudtshoorn Courant."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
